channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [GAIL] GAIL signs MoU with RailTel to explore telecom business opportunities
item.description:
GAIL (India) Limited has entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with RailTel Corporation of India Limited to collaborate in the key sectors of digital infrastructure in the country. The partnership aims to reinforce India's communication framework, improve resource utilisation, and drive forward the nation's digital connectivity initiatives. It is in line with GAIL's vision to integrate energy and digital infrastructure, leveraging artificial intelligence.

  • GAIL and RailTel signed an MoU on 05.03.2026 to collaborate in digital infrastructure
  • The partnership aims to strengthen India's digital backbone and improve communication infrastructure
  • It seeks to improve resource utilisation and drive forward digital connectivity initiatives
  • The collaboration is in line with GAIL's vision to integrate energy and digital infrastructure using AI
  • RailTel's Chairman and Managing Director, Sanjai Kumar, expressed commitment to strengthening digital infrastructure

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GAIL (INDIA) LTD. | Category: MoU

item.title: [IL&FSENGG] IL&FS Engineering and Construction Company Ltd Clarifies Delay in Submission of Q3, 2025-26 Unaudited Financial Results
item.description:
IL&FS Engineering and Construction Company Ltd has clarified the reason for the delay in submitting the unaudited financial results for the quarter and nine months ended 31st December 2025. The company had approved the results in a board meeting on 5th February 2026 and submitted them within the stipulated timelines. However, due to a technical glitch at the Exchange platform, the submitted documents were not reflecting on the platform. The company has submitted the documents again and requested the Exchange to take the clarification on record.

  • IL&FS Engineering and Construction Company Ltd clarified the delay in submitting the unaudited financial results for Q3, 2025-26.
  • The company had approved and submitted the results within the stipulated timelines.
  • A technical glitch at the Exchange platform prevented the submitted documents from reflecting on the platform.
  • The company has submitted the documents again and requested the Exchange to take the clarification on record.
  • The financial results are for the quarter and nine months ended 31st December 2025.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IL&FS ENGINEERING AND CONSTRUCTION COMPANY LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [VEEFIN] PSB Xchange Connects with WOGOM to Expand Institutional Credit Access for 7000+ MSMEs
item.description:
🔥 Trending

PSB Xchange, a unified digital credit infrastructure platform supported by 12 Public Sector Banks in India and powered by Veefin Solutions’ Technology, has enabled a ₹5,000 crore credit pipeline. This integration connects WOGOM's network of over 7000 retailers with PSB Xchange, aiming to strengthen supply chain financing access for SMEs and MSMEs across India’s distribution ecosystem. The model seeks to improve credit flow and strengthen trust across the retail supply chain ecosystem.

  • PSB Xchange and WOGOM enable a ₹5,000 crore credit pipeline for MSMEs and retailers.
  • The integration connects WOGOM's network of over 7000 retailers with PSB Xchange's multi-lender working capital ecosystem.
  • Real trade transactions on the WOGOM platform are connected to institutional, bank-backed financing through PSB Xchange.
  • The partnership simplifies and accelerates working capital access for MSME retailers and distributors.
  • The model aims to improve credit flow and strengthen trust across the retail supply chain ecosystem.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Veefin Solutions Ltd | Category: Partnership

item.title: [HOCL] HOCL Kochi Unit Temporarily Shuts Down Due to Disruption in LPG Supply
item.description:
Hindustan Organic Chemicals Ltd (HOCL) has announced the temporary shutdown of its Kochi unit, which is engaged in manufacturing Phenol, Acetone, and Hydrogen Peroxide. The shutdown is due to the disruption in the continuous supply of LPG by BPCL, resulting in the production load reduction of the Phenol & Cumene plant. The PRU unit and all other down the line units will be temporarily shut down for 2 days, while the Hydrogen Peroxide plant will continue to operate as usual. The buffer stock of LPG available with HOCL will be fully utilized by today evening.

  • HOCL Kochi unit temporarily shuts down due to LPG supply disruption
  • Production load of Phenol & Cumene plant reduced
  • PRU unit and all other down the line units to be shut down for 2 days
  • Hydrogen Peroxide plant to continue operations
  • Buffer stock of LPG to be fully utilized today evening

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HINDUSTAN ORGANIC CHEMICALS LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [BAZELINTER] Bazel International Ltd Corrects Typographical Error in Bonus Issue Face Value
item.description:
Bazel International Ltd has corrected a typographical error in the face value of equity shares mentioned in the bonus issue. The error was in the paragraph relating to the bonus issue in the Outcome of the Board Meeting dated February 20, 2026. The correct face value of the equity shares is Rs. 10/- (Rupees Ten only) each. The revised Outcome of the Board Meeting is attached for record. The meeting of the Board of Directors of the Company was held on Friday, 20th February, 2026, where the Board inter alia considered and approved the allotment of 38,55,222 (Thirty Eight Lacs Fifty Five Thousand Two Hundred Twenty Two) fully paid-up Bonus Equity Shares in the ratio 1:1.

  • Bazel International Ltd has corrected a typographical error in the face value of equity shares mentioned in the bonus issue.
  • The correct face value of the equity shares is Rs. 10/- (Rupees Ten only) each.
  • The revised Outcome of the Board Meeting is attached for record.
  • The meeting of the Board of Directors of the Company was held on Friday, 20th February, 2026.
  • The Board approved the allotment of 38,55,222 (Thirty Eight Lacs Fifty Five Thousand Two Hundred Twenty Two) fully paid-up Bonus Equity Shares in the ratio 1:1.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bazel International Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SUTLEJTEX] Sutlej Textiles to Consider Employee Stock Option Scheme on March 12, 2026
item.description:
Sutlej Textiles and Industries Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on March 12, 2026, to consider the introduction and adoption of an Employee Stock Option Scheme. This decision is in accordance with the SEBI (Share Based Employee Benefits and Sweat Equity) Regulations, 2021 and other applicable laws and regulations, subject to the approval of the shareholders.

  • Sutlej Textiles and Industries Ltd has scheduled a Board Meeting on March 12, 2026
  • The agenda includes the consideration of an Employee Stock Option Scheme
  • The decision is in accordance with the SEBI (Share Based Employee Benefits and Sweat Equity) Regulations, 2021
  • The approval of the shareholders is required for the introduction and adoption of the scheme
  • The announcement is in compliance with Regulation 29(1) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUTLEJ TEXTILES & INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: ESOP

item.title: [STERPOW] Sterling Powergensys Ltd to Consider Re-Appointment of Managing Director
item.description:
Sterling Powergensys Ltd has informed the BSE that a meeting of the Board of Directors is scheduled on 14/03/2026. The meeting will consider and approve the re-appointment of Mr. Sankaran Venkata Subramanian as Managing Director of the Company. Any other matter can be considered with the permission of the chair and majority of directors present at the meeting.

  • Sterling Powergensys Ltd scheduled a Board Meeting on 14/03/2026
  • The meeting will consider and approve the re-appointment of Mr. Sankaran Venkata Subramanian as Managing Director
  • Any other matter can be considered with the permission of the chair and majority of directors present at the meeting

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sterling Powergensys Limited | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SWADHATURE] Swadha Nature Ltd Shifts Registered Office to New Location
item.description:
Swadha Nature Ltd, in compliance with SEBI regulations, has announced the shifting of its registered office from 303, Prasad Tower, Opp Jain Derasar, Nehrunagar Cross Road, Manekbag, Ahmedabad, Gujarat, 380015 to 50/4, Jalaram Park, Bhairavnath Road, Pushpkunj, Maningar, Ahmedabad-380008. The decision was made at a Board of Directors meeting held on Monday, March 09, 2026.

  • Swadha Nature Ltd has decided to shift its registered office to a new location in Ahmedabad.
  • The new registered office will be located at 50/4, Jalaram Park, Bhairavnath Road, Pushpkunj, Maningar, Ahmedabad-380008.
  • The decision was made at a Board of Directors meeting held on Monday, March 09, 2026.
  • The company is in compliance with Regulation 30 and 33 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
  • The shift is a significant business update for Swadha Nature Ltd.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Swadha Nature Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [AGSTRA] AGS Transact Technologies Delays Financial Results Due to Insolvency Process and Personnel Shortages
item.description:
🔥 Trending

AGS Transact Technologies Ltd. has delayed the declaration of its financial results for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025. The delay is due to the initiation of Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) by the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal, Mumbai Bench, and personnel shortages in various departments, including the finance department. The Company is also experiencing vacancies in the board of directors and the audit committee. The financial statements for FY 2024-25 are currently under audit, and the management is unable to compile the financial data for the reporting period due to the ongoing insolvency process and vacancies. The Company is working to expedite the process to finalize and complete the preparation of the Financial Statements at the earliest.

  • AGS Transact Technologies Ltd. has delayed the declaration of its financial results for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025.
  • The delay is due to the initiation of Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) by the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal, Mumbai Bench.
  • Personnel shortages in various departments, including the finance department, are contributing to the delay.
  • The Company is experiencing vacancies in the board of directors and the audit committee.
  • The financial statements for FY 2024-25 are currently under audit, and the management is unable to compile the financial data for the reporting period.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AGS Transact Technologies Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [TTC] Toss The Coin Ltd Declares Interim Dividend of Rs. 5/- per share for FY 2025-26
item.description:
Toss The Coin Ltd, in continuation to their intimation dated 04.03.2026, and pursuant to Regulation 30 and 33 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 as amended, announced the declaration of an Interim Dividend (3rd for FY 2025-26) of Rs. 5/- per share. The dividend will be given to those equity shareholders whose names appear in the Register of Members as on 13th March 2026 (Record Date). The trading window for dealing in equity shares of the Company will open post 48 hours after the declaration of the Interim Dividend.

  • Toss The Coin Ltd declares Interim Dividend of Rs. 5/- per share for FY 2025-26
  • The dividend is applicable to equity shareholders registered as of 13th March 2026
  • Trading window for equity shares to open 48 hours post dividend declaration

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Toss The Coin Ltd | Category: Dividend
